title: InGameStats
description: Adds an in-game configurable overlay showing mined or placed stats of a block dynamically
body:
Adds an in-game configurable overlay showing mined or placed stats of a block dynamically.

👉🏻 Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

[Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is recommended to configure the mod.

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ZhuQZavl/images/bbc4d8e79ec7a97112a123f36572189265aa57d7.webp)

## ISSUES

### ⚠ DO NOT ASK (OR CREATE ISSUES) FOR UPDATES, UPDATES WILL COME WHENEVER I HAVE TIME ⚠

#### You would like to report an issue about this mod? refer to the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Loxoz/InGameStats/issues) and please be concise, unique, and constructive.

### You like what I do? Consider supporting me on my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Loxoz) so I can continue to make and update Minecraft mods like this!
